chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3849 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15739 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15740 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 None present for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Disposed of having become infructuous. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.169 of 2025 under Section 9(A)2, CNS Act, 2024 registered at police station Artillery, Karachi. Now the CNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted; therefore, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
